title: Das Feuerzeug
writer: Hans Christian Andersen, Margot Beichler, Siegfried Hartmann
actors: Rolf Ludwig, Heinz Schubert, Rolf Defrank
plot: There lived a soldier. He served the king and is now returning home. Once he met an old witch on the way, who promised him mountains of money in exchange for the fact that he would get her an old tinderbox.
